---
title: "Slide Not Found"
---

# 🎞️ Oops! Slide 404

That deck has rolled off the screen. The slide you're looking for either
hasn't been published yet, was renumbered in a recent revision, or
you've followed an old link.

## 🧭 Find your way back

- [🏠 Lecture slides home](/)
- [📖 Volume I: Foundations](https://mlsysbook.ai/vol1/)
- [📖 Volume II: At Scale](https://mlsysbook.ai/vol2/)
- [🎓 Instructor Hub](https://mlsysbook.ai/instructors/)

## 🔍 Search

Use the search box in the navbar to find a topic across all slide decks.

## 🐛 Still lost?

- [📝 Report a broken slide link](https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/issues/new)
- [💬 Ask the community](https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/discussions)

---

*"Every great lecture has at least one slide that goes missing in transit."* 🎬
